name: safetensors (HuggingFace)

auth.notes: Local file I/O; HuggingFace Hub token optional for private models

performance.notes: Memory-mapped I/O; loading large models significantly faster than pickle (.pt)

agent_readiness.notes: HuggingFace's safe alternative to pickle for storing tensors. Prevents arbitrary code execution during model loading (critical security fix over .pt files). Memory-mapped for fast partial loading. Simple API: save_file(tensors, path) / load_file(path). Multi-framework: PyTorch, TensorFlow, JAX, NumPy, PaddlePaddle. Now the default format on HuggingFace Hub (replaces .bin files). Bindings in Python, Rust, C, JavaScript.

gotchas: Does not support all tensor metadata types (no Python objects — intentional security feature)
Slightly larger file sizes than PyTorch .pt for some models
Requires explicit framework specification when loading
No compression (use zstd externally if needed)
best_when: Storing and distributing ML model weights securely
Fast model loading via memory mapping
HuggingFace Hub model sharing (now default format)
avoid_when: Need to store arbitrary Python objects alongside tensors
summary: safetensors is HuggingFace's secure tensor storage format that replaces pickle-based .pt/.bin files. Prevents arbitrary code execution during model loading — a critical security improvement. Memory-mapped for fast partial loading. Simple API, multi-framework (PyTorch/JAX/TF/NumPy). Now the default format on HuggingFace Hub. Essential for any ML workflow distributing model weights.
